response:
Progress Report, Part II  
This report highlights the visual enhancements achieved during the game's redevelopment. Although we successfully nearly doubled the frame rate by implementing optimization features in the framework, the integration of new hardware-intensive functionalities, such as dynamic fluid particles and physics-based hair strands, introduces performance challenges. We will work to maintain a balance between these features.  

Picture #1 illustrates the new belly bulge system. In the redeveloped game, each character has a specific stomach capacity that determines how much "body fluid" they can absorb through their womb, stomach, and bowels. For example, Dr. Anya can take in 4000ml of sperm without overflowing, whereas Alet can only take 2800ml. Male test subjects release a different amount of fluid into the female during climax: a Dreamer typically expels about 10-15ml, while an Elder Thing can pump 400-600ml.  

Picture #2 and #3 showcase the new cum and love juice graphics. The fluid effects are not pre-designed for sex scenes and instead activate dynamically based on the character's sensitivity, ecstasy level, and stamina. Certain character perks, obtained through testing with specific test subjects, may increase the likelihood of urinary incontinence or significant squirting.  

Picture #4 and #5 depict dynamic body interactions and skin decals in VR. The hands are controlled using a VR controller.  

Pictures #6, #7, and #8 present previews of upcoming bondage devices and cooperative sex scenarios. More details will be released next month.  

The May Monthly Poll and returning costume bundle will be available in a few hours.
